prompt: Gua mau riset cepet 5 menit doang: kompetitor PeTa (platform micro-task bayar buat komen di internet, target pasar Indonesia). Cari 3-5 platform sejenis yang ada di Indonesia atau SEA, kasih tau pricing model mereka, level/tier system, sama 1 hal yang mereka lakukan lebih bagus dari PeTa. Output dalam tabel singkat.

assertions.text: Output includes a table (markdown or otherwise structured) with 3-5 competitors
Table has columns covering pricing model, level/tier system, and a competitor advantage
Routing decision visible (either announced GPT Agent vs Claude plan, or noted 'all Claude' in Inspector Report)
Inspector Report block present at end
Inspector Report does NOT include Code health/Security lines (non-coding task)
Chat prose uses short sentences (avg <8 words)
Table content (cells) stay readable, not caveman-corrupted
